lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.general_idea: Replace the monolithic @Data annotation with explicit @Getter, @Setter, @NoArgsConstructor, and @AllArgsConstructor to gain finer control over generated code.
Simplify the student model by replacing separate name fields with a single 'name' field and adding a 'code' field.
lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.human_impl: Replaced firstName, middleName, lastName with name; added code field.

lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.general_idea: Add a dateOfBirth field to the Student class to track birth dates.
Introduce a specific single-argument constructor for the Student class.
lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.human_impl: Added public Student(String name) { this.name = name; }

lombok-introduction/src/main/java/com/hu.general_idea: Remove the country field as it is no longer part of the Student model.

spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group java.* imports before third-party imports.
Adjust code indentation from 4 spaces to 2 spaces to match project style.
spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.human_impl: Changed indentation of main method body from 4 spaces to 2 spaces.

spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.general_idea: Reorder imports to group java.* imports before third-party imports, adhering to standard Java coding conventions.
spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.human_impl: Moved java.math.BigDecimal, java.sql.ResultSet, and java.sql.SQLException imports above org.springframework imports.

spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.general_idea: Standardize code indentation to use 2 spaces instead of 4 spaces for consistent formatting.
spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.human_impl: Changed indentation of class members and method bodies from 4 spaces to 2 spaces.

spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.general_idea: Reorder import statements to group java.* imports before third-party and local imports.
Change code indentation from 4 spaces to 2 spaces to match a new coding style.
spring-jdbc-transaction-management/src/m.human_impl: replaced 4-space indents with 2-space indents for fields and method bodies

Add maven-compiler-plugin to explicitly configure Java source and target levels.
